emittedFile:sourceMapUnclosedBlock.lua
sourceFile:sourceMapUnclosedBlock.tlua
-------------------------------------------------------------------
>>>{ }
1 >
2 >^
3 > ^
4 >  ^
5 >   
6 >   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^->
1 >
2 >{
3 > 
4 >  
5 >   
1 >Emitted(1, 1) Source(1, 1) + SourceIndex(0)
2 >Emitted(1, 2) Source(1, 2) + SourceIndex(0)
3 >Emitted(1, 3) Source(1, 2) + SourceIndex(0)
4 >Emitted(1, 4) Source(1, 3) + SourceIndex(0)
5 >Emitted(1, 4) Source(1, 2) + SourceIndex(0)
---
>>>//# sourceMappingURL=sourceMapUnclosedBlock.lua.map
